title: Preparation, Ghusl, and Ihram Clothing
instruction: Trim nails and unwanted hair beforehand, perform ghusl if possible, and wear Ihram before reaching Miqat. Men wear two white unstitched cloths; women wear modest normal dress without niqab or gloves.
recite: Make intention in your heart and begin Talbiyah: Labbayka Allahumma Labbayk.
details: From this point, avoid perfume, marital relations, and cutting hair or nails until you exit Ihram. Keep your heart focused on sincerity and humility.

title: Arrival and Entering Masjid al-Haram
instruction: Enter with calmness and gratitude. If possible, enter with your right foot and make dua. Keep Talbiyah until beginning Tawaf.
recite: Allahummaftah li abwaba rahmatik (O Allah, open for me the doors of Your mercy).
details: Do not rush to the Kaaba through crowds. Preserve safety and good manners with fellow pilgrims.

title: Tawaf (7 Circuits Around the Kaaba)
instruction: Start from the Black Stone line and complete 7 anticlockwise rounds. Men may do idtiba' and brisk walk in first 3 rounds if space allows.
recite: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanah wa fil-akhirati hasanah wa qina adhaban-nar.
details: Avoid pushing and harming others. Any authentic dhikr and personal dua can be recited throughout Tawaf.

title: Two Rak'ah and Zamzam
instruction: Pray two rak'ah after Tawaf if possible, then drink Zamzam and make sincere dua.
recite: Allahumma inni as'aluka ilman nafi'an, wa rizqan wasi'an, wa shifa'an min kulli da'.
details: If crowded, pray in any available place in Masjid al-Haram. Allah accepts effort with sincerity.

title: Sa'i Between Safa and Marwah
instruction: Complete 7 trips starting at Safa and ending at Marwah. Men may jog between green markers when feasible.
recite: Inna as-Safa wal-Marwata min sha'a'irillah... and abundant personal duas.
details: There is no single fixed dua for each lap. Keep dhikr, Quran recitation, and heartfelt supplication.

title: Halq or Taqsir to Exit Ihram
instruction: Men should shave (best) or shorten all around. Women trim approximately fingertip-length from their hair.
recite: Ask Allah for acceptance: Allahumma taqabbal minni.
details: After hair cutting, Umrah is complete and Ihram restrictions are lifted. Maintain gratitude and good conduct.
